final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing illustration of a 抖音 live-stream screenshot featuring a young woman resembling a famous Chinese actress known as "神仙姐姐".

Style/medium: needs a realistic live-stream screenshot aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 9:16 vertical, mimicking a 抖音 live-stream UI layout with on-screen overlays (viewer count, comments, gifts, etc.)
Subject: must include a young woman (神仙姐姐 likeness, elegant and ethereal) holding up a handwritten sign facing the camera
Scene/backdrop: needs a typical live-stream room or studio backdrop — exact setting is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, welcoming live-stream atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" on the sign held by the subject; must include typical 抖音 live-stream UI text overlays (viewer count, comment bubbles, etc.) in appropriate positions
Constraints: must preserve 9:16 aspect ratio; sign text must be clearly legible and held visibly in the subject's hands
Avoid:
